suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Pages should resolve direction IDs from the data file dynamically (e.g., building name→ID maps from jade_dashboard.json at load time) rather than hardcoding direction-name-to-ID maps. Hardcoded maps create maintenance hazards and data-drift bugs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature v2-showcase-deep-dive-surfaces introduced a hardcoded directionIdMap in evidence.html with 9 entries, two of which (墨翠雕刻件/dir_009 and 翡翠珍珠混搭/dir_007) were swapped vs the actual data, causing incorrect navigation for those directions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: When displaying judgment state statistics or summaries, always show all 4 canonical judgment categories (值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) even if some have zero count. This ensures consistency across pages and prevents user confusion about missing categories.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature v2-showcase-deep-dive-surfaces direction-map stats summary shows only 3 of 4 judgment categories (omits 需要补证据 with 3 directions), while the homepage today's judgment summary shows all categories. This inconsistency could confuse users comparing views.
